# MyUsage

> Native macOS menu bar app that tracks AI coding tool usage (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity) across multiple Macs via a user-chosen sync folder. No backend, MIT licensed, zero third-party dependencies, written in Swift / SwiftUI.

## About

MyUsage solves a problem the official tools don't: when you use Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or Antigravity across more than one Mac, each device's official UI only shows what *it* knows. You hit a weekly limit on Friday because your laptop has been burning through tokens all morning while your desktop's "remaining" number lied to you.

MyUsage runs as a small macOS menu bar app, talks to all four providers from each Mac, and writes per-device snapshots into a folder you already sync (iCloud Drive, Syncthing, Dropbox, NFS — your choice). The popover then shows the *aggregate* across every Mac sharing that folder.

Core design tenets:

- **No MyUsage backend exists.** The sync transport is whatever you already use; the app never phones home.
- **One menu bar, four providers.** Glance-able status without opening four apps.
- **Burn-rate projection.** Each rolling-window bar shows a dashed marker at the projected end-of-window position (alarm-only — silent when on track).
- **Privacy-respecting device identity.** Multi-device sync uses a salted SHA-256 of `IOPlatformUUID`; raw hardware UUID never leaves the process.

- [Latest release](https://github.com/zchan0/MyUsage/releases/latest)
- [Install guide](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/install)

## Documentation

- [Multi-device sync](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/docs/multi-device-sync) — How the BYO-folder aggregation works, device identity model
- [Claude Code setup](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/docs/claude) — OAuth credential discovery, plan label fetching
- [Codex setup](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/docs/codex) — Local credential reading, weekly + 5h windows
- [Cursor setup](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/docs/cursor) — SQLite probing, billing-cycle vs included quota
- [Antigravity setup](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/docs/antigravity) — Per-model quota tracking, IDE running indicator

## Blog

- [Designing a 4 pt progress bar — eight iterations with Claude Code as designer-of-record](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/blog/limit-bar-iteration)
- [No backend, BYO sync folder — multi-device aggregation without a server](https://zchan0.github.io/MyUsage/blog/no-backend-sync-architecture)

## Quick facts

- **Platform:** macOS 14+ (Sonoma)
- **License:** MIT
- **Language:** Swift 6 / SwiftUI
- **Dependencies:** zero third-party (built-in SQLite3, Security.framework, Foundation only)
- **Distribution:** ad-hoc signed (no paid Apple Developer cert yet)
- **Latest version:** see [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/zchan0/MyUsage/releases/latest)
